relationships: kab:Ur ilaq ara ad nettkel ɣef wayen iɛeddan
kab:Mary tenna-d dakken tella tesfillit i wayen n diri
kab:Ur zmireɣ ara ad ssegziɣ amek armi i d-yeḍra wayen
kab:Ur as-yeɛǧib ara i Tom wayen ayen texdem Mary
kab:Ur tezmiremt ara ad tkecmemt s wayen
kab:Gziɣ yella wayen ur yeddin ara
kab:Ur as-yehwi ara i Tom wayen texdem Mary
kab:Ur d-ssekcam ara iman-ik deg wayen i xeddmeɣ
kab:Ur d-ssekcam ara iman-im deg wayen i xeddmeɣ
kab:Ur tezmirem ara ad tkecmem s wayen
kab:Aṭas n wayen ara iẓer yiwen i yellan deg Paris
kab:Ur gziɣ acemma seg wayen akka i d-teqqareḍ
kab:Sami ur yeẓri kra deg wayen i ḍeṛṛun dagi
